leeway.DISCOVERY_PIPELINE: Voice -> Intent -> Location -> Vertical -> Ranking -> Render

voices.label: Agent Lee Default Voice
voices.description: The locked-in LeeWay live clone voice for Agent Lee. This is the absolute baseline and cannot be deleted.
voices.referenceText: OK let's go ahead and create this. I'll speak into the mic for a certain amount of time. And the words that I'm actually going to say are the words I want the clone voice to be able to say.
